messages.text: survive is crazy when you look like the final boss
you typed that smiling way too hard huh
guilty, that white tank top got main character energy
relax, it is literally cotton and vibes
yeah but the cotton and vibes combo looks dangerous
dangerous for who, your self control or your screen
apple said stop posting from that bed for public safety
you blaming my bed for your weak discipline now
im saying that bed clearly has villain training hours
funny, yet im still not moved enough to care
im just trying to see the bed menace in 3d
cute angle, still not booking outside time for you
let me take you out this week
